text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Whew. It's finally the last day of summer camp...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Heh... My engines were operating at full
capacity...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
So I'm just gonna... close my eyes... on the bus
home...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I'll wake up... when we get there...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I let her get some good rest on the bus this year
too.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Heehee, I slept like a log on the bus! I think I can
do some extra training now...
choice_data_list: You still seem pretty sleepy to me.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yeah... I think so too, but...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: She was really twinkly—so bright I had to squint.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I really wanna train now. Can we?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After rubbing her eyes a few times, she runs off to
the training center.
